title: Bridge Essay: Psychedelics, entropic brain theory, and the taxonomy of conscious states: a sum

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nonordinary Rendering** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nonordinary — psychedelic decoupling, ego dissolution, DMN disruption, altered states.

**Psychedelics, entropic brain theory, and the taxonomy of conscious states: asummary of debates and perspectives.**. Neurosci Conscious.. PMID: 37025356. DOI: 10.1093/nc/niad001. Given their recent success in counseling and psychiatry, the dialogue around psychedelics has mainly focused on their applications for mental health. Insights from psychedelic research, however, are not limited to treating mental health, but also have much to offer our current understanding of consciousness.
